'''Quian Vos''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Kiffu Guardians|Kiffu Guardian]]. She was married to [[Pethros Vos]] with whom she had a son, [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan]]. She was the cousin of [[Tinté Vos]], who arranged to give Quian and Pethros to the [[Anzat (species)|Anzati]] as a sacrifice in exchange for the Anzati feeding on the [[Kiffex/Legends|Kiffex]] prisoners.
